name: Marci
description: Whistle Link Marci bounds to the targeted unit, choosing a direction and distance she will spring away from it. Grants the targeted ally a short duration movement speed bonus. Upon reaching the unit, Marci leaps to her final destination, damaging and stunning enemies in the area.

abilities.name: Special Delivery
abilities.description: Marci whistles and instantly teleports her to her. Effect Radius: Global Teleport. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Effect Radius: Global. Courier Level Bonus: 3. Hit Count Bonus: 1. Creeps Hit Count Bonus: 2. Mana Cost: 240.

abilities.name: Dispose
abilities.description: Grabs the unit-targeted ally or enemy unit and throws it effortlessly behind her, damaging and slowing the unit if it's an enemy. Additionally damages and applies a movement speed slow to all enemy units within the landing radius. Cast Range: 175. Landing Radius: 300. Throw Distance: 250. Landing Damage: 60/150/240/330 (160/250/340/430). Throw Duration: 0.5. Move Speed Slow: 20%/30%/40%/50%. Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 80.

abilities.name: Rebound
abilities.description: Adds enemy targeting functionality, and Marci applies the movement speed boost on herself upon cast. Increases damage. Cast Range: 450/550/650/750. Max Leap Distance: 450/550/650/750. Leap Distance Buffer: 700. Ally Move Speed Bonus: 15%/20%/25%/30% (27%/32%/37%/42%). Landing Radius: 300 (350). Damage: 75/150/225/300 (90/180/270/360). Cooldown: 24/20/16/12. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.description: Grants the unit-targeted ally a damage barrier, and a portion of Marci's lifesteal and attack damage bonuses. The barrier depletes either upon Marci or upon the unit-targeted ally receiving damage. Although the barrier depletes either upon Marci or upon the unit-targeted ally receiving damage, the barrier value restores corresponding to Marci's attack damage dealt on enemy heroes. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Lifesteal: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Cast Range: 500. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 9%/13.5%/18%/22.5%. Lifesteal: 9%/13.5%/18%/22.5%. Duration: 7. Cooldown: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Unleash
abilities.description: The last strike in every flurry combo unleashes a damaging pulse around the target, and slows the target's movement speed and its base attack speed. Max Attack Charges per Flurry: 5. Move Speed Bonus: 15% (30%). Duration: 16. Duration Increase per Kill: (6). Self Attack Speed Bonus: 700/925/1150. Combo Time Window: 1. Cooldown: 80/70/60. Mana Cost: 100/125/150.
